name: PowerPlug Article Generator v2 — Agent Zero 2026-04-16

nodes.name: Set PowerPlug Brand Context

assignments.name: author_bio
assignments.value: PowerPlug delivers enterprise PC power management software that reduces endpoint energy costs by up to 60%. Trusted by Clalit Health Services, Rambam Healthcare Campus, Ben Gurion University, and leading enterprises worldwide.

assignments.name: trust_clients
assignments.value: Clalit Health Services (45,000 PCs), Rambam Healthcare Campus, Ben Gurion University

nodes.notes: CRITICAL: These brand values must be injected into every article. Never override with external agency values.

nodes.name: Generate Article Content (LLM)
nodes.notes: Uses Improved_N8N_Prompt.txt as system prompt. Inject brand context from previous node.

nodes.name: Build WordPress-Safe HTML
nodes.notes: Brand safety layer: catches and fixes any branding errors from LLM output.

nodes.name: Validate Brand & Structure
nodes.notes: All 9 checks must pass. If not, route to error handler.

nodes.name: Publish to WordPress
nodes.notes: Publishes as draft. Status set to 'draft' for manual review before going live.

nodes.name: Brand Validation Error
nodes.notes: Returns validation failure details for debugging.
